summary: Tooling-only PR that refreshed Rust dependency lockfile contents and broadened the publish-packages workflow path filters so package publishing checks also run when Cargo.lock, reqs/**/*.txt, or tools/**/*.py change.

key_files.role: Rust dependency lockfile regenerated/updated with many package version, checksum, dependency, addition, and removal changes.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: Cargo.lock shows package updates such as adler->adler2 2.0.1, ahash 0.8.8->0.8.12, anyhow 1.0.79->1.0.102, clap 4.5.0->4.6.1

key_files.role: GitHub Actions workflow path filters expanded for push and pull_request triggers.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added Cargo.lock, reqs/**/*.txt, and tools/**/*.py under both push.paths and pull_request.paths

what_changed.text: Updated Cargo.lock across many Rust crates; the loaded diff shows version/checksum/dependency changes and some package additions/removals.
Added Cargo.lock, reqs/**/*.txt, and tools/**/*.py to publish-packages workflow path filters for both push and pull_request triggers.
No C decompilation source files, symbols, headers, splits, or assembly were changed in the loaded file list.

smart_moves.text: Kept the dependency refresh scoped to the generated Rust lockfile plus the workflow trigger needed to notice relevant tooling/dependency changes.
Expanded workflow triggers symmetrically for push and pull_request, avoiding a mismatch between branch pushes and PR checks.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: identical added path entries under push.paths and pull_request.paths

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.
The decomp-dev bot reported GALE01 no changes for the compared revisions.
